title: مرسوم بقانون رقم (11) لسنة 1999 بتنظيم تركيب واستعمال مكبرات الصوت
title_en: Decree No. (12) of 1999 approving the Loan Convention to Contribute to the Financing of Part of the Sewage Water Treatment and Utilization Project between the Government of the State of Bahrain and the Kuwait Fund for Arab Economic Development
